description: ONDEWO Session Initiation Protocol (SIP) Client library for Typescript

scripts.pretest: tsc auth/offlineTokenProvider.ts auth/offlineTokenProvider.spec.ts examples/ts-client.ts examples/ts-client.spec.ts --ignoreConfig --module commonjs --target es2020 --strict --lib es2020,dom --skipLibCheck --sourceMap --types node --typeRoots ./node_modules/@types --outDir .test-build && ln -sfn ../api .test-build/api
scripts.test: npm run test:auth && npm run test:examples
